title: paphiopedilum niveum
intro: Paphiopedilum niveum, commonly known as the Snowy Venus Slipper Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas and China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Paphiopedilum niveum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
